summary: Bug fix verification for generator reset issue - fixes verified. Desktop GenerationPanel now receives promptHistory prop, mobile conversation feed preserves messages, idle state only shows when no history. 1 minor fix applied to ProjectBuilder.tsx (added missing promptHistory prop to mobile AI overlay). Backend 12/12 pass, conversation-history.spec.ts 19/21 pass (2 Cloudflare), mobile-builder.spec.ts 18/19 pass (1 Cloudflare), generator-reset-fix.spec.ts 11/12 pass (1 Cloudflare), persistent-projects.spec.ts 7/16 pass (9 Cloudflare).

issues.description: Generator reset bug fix verified - Desktop GenerationPanel now receives promptHistory prop, conversation feed preserves messages, and idle state logic is correct (shows only when no history AND no messages). Also fixed missing promptHistory prop on mobile AI overlay component.
Multiple frontend tests are flaky due to Cloudflare captcha challenges on the preview URL. Tests pass when Cloudflare doesn't block. This is an infrastructure issue, not a code bug.

test_results.frontend: 79% (55/68 tests pass - 13 flaky due to Cloudflare blocking)

seed_data_creation: Using existing demo project proj-demo-1 with todo-app for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Generator reset bug fix is verified and working. Key changes: 1) useGenerationPipeline.ts no longer clears messages at start of generate() - preserves conversation history. 2) GenerationPanel.tsx merges promptHistory with pipeline messages for display. 3) Desktop idle state shows only when no history AND no messages. 4) MobileBuilderView.tsx receives and uses promptHistory for feed items. 5) Fixed missing promptHistory prop on mobile AI overlay in ProjectBuilder.tsx. New spec generator-reset-fix.spec.ts covers these scenarios.
